name: Source-routed (label switching)
failure_mode: Sender carries the full path as a label stack. Any failed hop drops the packet — sender must rediscover and retry. Scales sub-linearly with mesh size.
summary: Routing decisions baked into the packet itself (cjdns 'labels'). Forwarders are dumb — they read the next hop from the label and pass it on. Tiny per-hop work, but path repair is the sender's problem.
